AxReportDesign.Name: Report
AxReportDesign.Text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <Report xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/sqlserver/reporting/2016/01/reportdefinition" xmlns:rd="http://schemas.microsoft.com/SQLServer/reporting/reportdesigner"> <AutoRefresh>0</AutoRefresh> <DataSources> <DataSource Name="AutoGen__ReportDataProvider"> <Transaction>true</Transaction> <ConnectionProperties> <DataProvider>AXREPORTDATAPROVIDER</DataProvider> <ConnectString /> <IntegratedSecurity>true</IntegratedSecurity> </ConnectionProperties> <rd:DataSourceID>39401bb3-90dc-42e0-9e59-9d3cfac96d35</rd:DataSourceID> </DataSource> </DataSources> <DataSets> <DataSet Name="ETGCylinderDepositStatusReport"> <Query> <DataSourceName>AutoGen__ReportDataProvider</DataSourceName> <QueryParameters> <QueryParameter Name="AX_PartitionKey"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_PartitionKey.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_CompanyName"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_CompanyName.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_UserContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_UserContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RenderingCulture"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RenderingCulture.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_ReportContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_ReportContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RdpPreProcessedId"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RdpPreProcessedId.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="FromDate"> <Value>=Parameters!FromDate.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="ToDate"> <Value>=Parameters!ETGCylinderDepositStatusReport_ToDate.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="parmCustAccount"> <Value>=Parameters!parmCustAccount.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="parmInvoiceId"> <Value>=Parameters!parmInvoiceId.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="Deposit"> <Value>=Parameters!Deposit.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="parmSize"> <Value>=Parameters!parmSize.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> </QueryParameters> <CommandText>SELECT * FROM ETGCylinderDepositStatusReportDP.ETGCylinderDepositStatusReportTmp </CommandText> <rd:UseGenericDesigner>true</rd:UseGenericDesigner> </Query> <Fields> <Field Name="CustAccount"> <DataField>ETGCylinderDepositStatusReportTmp.1.CustAccount</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="CustName"> <DataField>ETGCylinderDepositStatusReportTmp.1.CustName</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="DeliveryNoteNumber"> <DataField>ETGCylinderDepositStatusReportTmp.1.DeliveryNoteNumber</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGBusinessSegmentLabel"> <DataField>ETGCylinderDepositStatusReportTmp.1.ETGBusinessSegment:LABEL(ETGBusinessSegment)</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGBusinessSegmentName"> <DataField>ETGCylinderDepositStatusReportTmp.1.ETGBusinessSegment:NAME(ETGBusinessSegment)</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGConnectionTypeLabel"> <DataField>ETGCylinderDepositStatusReportTmp.1.ETGConnectionType:LABEL(ETGConnectionType)</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGConnectionTypeName"> <DataField>ETGCylinderDepositStatusReportTmp.1.ETGConnectionType:NAME(ETGConnectionType)</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGDepositAmount"> <DataField>ETGCylinderDepositStatusReportTmp.1.ETGDepositAmount</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Int32</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGDepositLabel"> <DataField>ETGCylinderDepositStatusReportTmp.1.ETGDeposit:LABEL(NoYes)</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGDepositName"> <DataField>ETGCylinderDepositStatusReportTmp.1.ETGDeposit:NAME(NoYes)</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGDepositRate"> <DataField>ETGCylinderDepositStatusReportTmp.1.ETGPackSize</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="InventColorId"> <DataField>ETGCylinderDepositStatusReportTmp.1.InventColorId</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="InventLocationId"> <rd:DataSetName>ETGCylinderDepositStatusReport</rd:DataSetName> <rd:TableName>Fields</rd:TableName> <rd:TableAdapterFillMethod>Fill</rd:TableAdapterFillMethod> <rd:TableAdapterGetDataMethod>GetData</rd:TableAdapterGetDataMethod> <rd:TableAdapterName>FieldsTableAdapter</rd:TableAdapterName> </rd:DataSetInfo> </DataSet> </DataSets> <ReportSections> <TablixRow> <Height>0.25in</Height> <TablixCells> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox39"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox
